x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generates C# classes from LionWeb languages

options.name: --outputDir
options.description: Directory to write generated files to

options.name: --outputFile
options.description: File to write generated language to

options.name: --namespacePattern
options.description: Pattern for namespace to generate languages into

options.name: --pathPattern
options.description: Pattern for file to generate languages into, defaults to VerbatimName

options.name: --lionWebVersion
options.description: LionWeb version to use, defaults to 2024.1

options.name: --dotGSuffix
options.description: Whether output file should have .g suffix before .cs, defaults to True

options.name: --writableInterfaces
options.description: Whether generated interfaces should implement IWritableNode

options.name: --unresolvedReferenceHandling
options.description: How generated code should handle unresolved references

arguments.name: languageFile
arguments.description: LionWeb JSON file(s) containing languages to generate
